creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Brief comparisons, in chronological order: 

* <https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-questions/2021-September/294699.html> 
  both URLs in angle brackets are clickable

* <https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-questions/2021-September/294710.html> 
  both URLs are clickable

* <https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-questions/2021-October/000031.html> 
  the one URL is not clickable; at 
  <https://markmail.org/message/y4dtyxtkqou7xboz> and at 
  <http://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/mid.cgi?CAKX4Vk_=vYVHHSxzZnm9XV+9tv0XCz7z7uSCu4o=anCsqA2gKQ> 
  it is clickable 

* <https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-questions/2022-June/001440.html> 
  none of the URLs in angle brackets are clickable; at 
  <http://markmail.org/message/zozsa2h5g5uup2yc> and at 
  <http://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/mid.cgi?648dfe19-efea-429e-880a-1f35ad40075b> 
  all are clickable.
